Uses of Enum
org.bukkit.boss.BarColor

Packages that use BarColor
Package
Description
org.bukkit
The root package of the Bukkit API, contains generalized API classes.
org.bukkit.boss
Classes concerning the creation of boss bars that appear at the top of the player's screen.

    Method
    Description
    static BossBar
    Bukkit.createBossBar(String title, BarColor color, BarStyle style, BarFlag... flags)
    Creates a boss bar instance to display to players.

    Creates a boss bar instance to display to players.
